title: Symptom
Description
table-1197-1197.pgTitle: Common Symptoms of Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE)
table-1197-1197.caption: What is the most common sign of patients with SLE disease?
data: Persistent tiredness not relieved by rest.
Pain, stiffness, and swelling, often in the hands, wrists, and feet.
Butterfly-shaped rash across the cheeks and nose (malar rash).
Low-grade fever without an apparent cause.
Sensitivity to sunlight, causing skin rashes or other symptoms to worsen.
